matter,

CHAMBERS OF 
THOMAS G, DUFFY 
JUDGE 
W:~~t ~unidpaI (!Tourt 
EL CAJON JUDICIAL DISTRICT 
110 EAST LEX!NGTON AVENUE 
EL CAJON, CALIFORNIA 
92020 
April 26, 1977 
State of California 
Fair Political Practices Commission 
Post Office Box 807 
Sacramento, California 
95804 
Re: 
Form 721 
Gentlemen: 
We have had a vacancy occur in our court by the appoint-
ment of Judge Alfred Lord to the Superior Court. 
Mr. 
Gerald Lewis, formerly the Ramona Justice Court judge, 
is entitled to succeed to the position under the pro-
visions of the Government Code. 
Mr. Lewis has not yet 
decided whether to elect to do so. 
But in the event he 
does, we will need a copy of the Statement of Economic 
Interests form for him to use, which we believe is your 
form 721. 
We would be grateful if you would send us 
several copies as soon as possible. 
We note that Government Code Section 87202 refers only 
to elected or appointed officials and does not therefore 
expressly cover the situation where a justice court judge 
succeeds to a municipal court position. 
We assume that 
he should follow the procedure required of an appointed 
official and file his form 721 in less than ten days 
prior to taking office. 
Please let us know if you hold 
views to the contrary. 
VerT truly yours, 
Judge 
TGD:rm

sections.question: We note that Government Code Section 87202 refers only to elected or appointed officials and does not therefore expressly cover the situation where a justice court judge succeeds to a municipal court position. We assume that he should follow the procedure required of an appointed official and file his form 721 in less than ten days prior to taking office. Please let us know if you hold views to the contrary.
sections.question_synthetic: Does Government Code Section 87202 require a justice court judge who succeeds to a municipal court position to file a Statement of Economic Interests form (Form 721) within ten days prior to taking office, following the procedure for appointed officials?
sections.parsing_notes: No section headers found; LLM: This is an incoming request letter from a judge to the FPPC, not an FPPC response. No conclusion or advice section is present. Document discusses Form 721 filing requirements under Government Code Section 87202. Request for form copies and clarification on applicability to judicial succession scenario.

embedding.qa_text: QUESTION: We note that Government Code Section 87202 refers only to elected or appointed officials and does not therefore expressly cover the situation where a justice court judge succeeds to a municipal court position. We assume that he should follow the procedure required of an appointed official and file his form 721 in less than ten days prior to taking office. Please let us know if you hold views to the contrary.

embedding.summary: Judge Thomas G. Duffy requests copies of the Statement of Economic Interests form (Form 721) for Gerald Lewis, a justice court judge who may succeed to a municipal court position, and seeks clarification on whether Section 87202 requires filing within ten days as for appointed officials.
